title: Huawei S210I-8P4SX Gigabit PoE smart industrial switch, 2x SFP, 2x SFP+, redundant power
description: Huawei eKitEngine S210I-8P4SX is an industrial L2 switch with an extended temperature range, designed for demanding environments and installation in outdoor or industrial enclosures. It offers 8x 10/100/1000BASE-T PoE+ ports for powering connected devices, 2x GE SFP and 2x 10GE SFP+ uplink ports , and 1x DI/DO interface . It supports both local web interface and cloud management (SNC / eKit App) . Thanks to its passive cooling , IP40 protection , and wide input voltage range of 9.6 - 60V DC ,… 8x GLAN with PoE+ support with a total power budget of up to 240 W 2x GE SFP + 2x 10GE SFP+ uplink ports 1x DI/DO interface for integration into industrial solutions Passive cooling â silent operation, no fans Industrial design : IP40 protection, surge, reverse polarity, and overheating protection Redundant power supply : supports 1+1 hot backup Advanced features : STP/PSTP, ERPS, link aggregation, industrial protocol prioritization (PROFINET, GOOSE) Perpetual PoE â ensures uninterrupted power supply to connected devices (PD) even during switch reboot or upgrade Device 1x 5-pin Phoenix connector for DI/DO ports
